name: Shooter Demo
description: Minimal NON-Hyperscape game plugin. Proves the engine-layer infrastructure (gameplay-framework + combat plugin + server/client plugin boot) can compose a different game than Hyperscape without any @hyperforge/shared modifications. Depends on @hyperforge/combat and contributes one ranged ability ('shoot') — symmetric to how @hyperforge/hyperscape depends on combat and contributes its OSRS abilities.
